title: Icy Herbal Syrian Lamb Kebabs
description: A refreshing and flavorful Syrian dish featuring lamb kebabs with a herbal twist, served with a side of piccalilli and a cooling ice bath shock, perfect for a low-carb brunch
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, parsley, mint, garlic, and lemon juice
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the herbal mixture
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees
Meanwhile, prepare the piccalilli according to package instructions
Once the kebabs are cooked, immediately submerge them in an ice bath to stop the cooking process
Serve the kebabs with a side of piccalilli and garnish with additional parsley and mint if desired
